[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Kerala Honeymoon Packages – All Inclusive & Affordable Tour Packages”][vc_column_text]

Kerala is blessed with natural beauty in abundance. The pristine beaches, lush greenery, beautiful mountain ranges, and sparkling backwaters truly make this place God’s Own Country and a much-loved honeymoon destination for newlyweds. At ATW Travels, we offer exclusive Kerala honeymoon packages that cover the most romantic destinations, allowing you to spend quality time with your beloved.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What’s Included in Our Kerala Honeymoon Package?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Hill stations, wildlife reserves, gorgeous backwaters, and pristine beaches are all included in our honeymoon package deals. You can also customize the package to suit your needs and budget. In addition, we provide a range of add-ons to help you craft an unforgettable experience. All of this comes with an assurance of safe travel, high-quality accommodations, and dependable guides and cabs. So, what are you waiting for? Start packing right away for your romantic getaway.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19365″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips to Help You Plan a Memorable Honeymoon Trip” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

At ATW Travels, we’ve provided all-inclusive Kerala Honeymoon packages for over four decades. A typical package covers accommodation, food, local transportation, and sightseeing, but if you’d like to make your vacation genuinely stress-free and memorable, here are a few pointers to help you:

  • Pack your clothes according to season. Wear warm clothes, a raincoat, and an insect spray during the monsoons. Carry light cotton clothing, caps, and sunscreen lotion in the summers.
  • Carry necessary medications in advance if you experience mountain sickness.
  • Many temples have strict dress codes; check with the agency about these restrictions and dress accordingly.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646218615747{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Stay Connected

[/vc_column_text][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-phone” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786099141{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

+91 9693339999

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator el_width=”30″][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-envelope” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786244533{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646218596540{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Packages

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What is the Cost of the Kerala Honeymoon Package?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Typical Kerala honeymoon package costs at ATW Travels start from Rs. 24,000 and could go up to Rs. 1,00,000, depending on where you stay, how you travel, and of course, the destinations listed on the itinerary.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which Part of Kerala is Best for a Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Every place in Kerala refreshes you with its breath-taking natural beauty and offers picturesque views. The following are some of Kerala’s most romantic locations.

  • Munnar
  • Thekkady
  • Wayanad
  • Alleppey

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19368″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What is the Best Time to Visit Kerala for a Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

At ATW Travels, we’ve curated Kerala honeymoon packages for all seasons. But the months of October to February are perfect for romantic getaways because you get to witness serenity in the lap of nature with your beloved. Travelling is much more comfortable during this time of the year because you don’t have to deal with the scorching heat or extreme rainfall.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why is ATW Travels the Best Travel Agency for Kerala Honeymoon Packages?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels offers affordable packages to incredibly romantic destinations in India and across the world. We are a fully integrated travel firm providing complete solutions for businesses and travel enthusiasts worldwide. We provide transparent and cost-effective solutions.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Looking for Best Beach-Based Kerala Honeymoon Package?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Our Kerala packages for couples include unique beaches that are romantic and beautiful, and yet safe. If taking a stroll with your love is your idea of romance, then witness the magic unfold at these beaches.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Kovalam Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

An internationally renowned beach that offers diverse leisure options to indulge in with your best half.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19369″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Kappad Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Kappad Beach is a historic beach where Vasco-da-Gama landed with his crew. This beautiful was recently awarded the Blue Flag certification for its sustainable tourism.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Varkala Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This beach is lined with beach shacks and shops and has striking scenery. It is incredibly romantic, with plenty of young couples enjoying a quiet stroll on the beach.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Marari Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This is ideal for a romantic getaway and perfect for lazing around with your beloved on the golden sand.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Cherai Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This is a beautiful location, especially if you are looking for solitude and a perfect place to spend with your loved one.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Somatheeram Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This is ideal for swimming and is famous for its multiple ayurvedic resorts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Bekal Beach” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

It is famous for its old fort and luxury resorts. Bekal is spotlessly clean and loved for its panoramic sights.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19371″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Honeymoon Destinations in Kerala” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_custom_heading text=”Munnar” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Enjoy the scenery and feel refreshed while you walk around Munnar’s beautiful waterfalls and tea estates. The hill station will provide you with a sense of serenity as you embark on the road to a beautiful married life. So, check out our Kerala honeymoon packages that include Munnar.

[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Kumarakom” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Kumarakom is a mesmerizing location that offers exotic sightseeing, boating, and fishing facilities. Do not miss out on the exquisite houseboats. Kumarakom’s bird sanctuary is a must-visit and is included in our Kerala honeymoon packages.

[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Thekkady” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

You should not miss out on the lush woods of Thekkady while you are in Kerala. It is home to India’s largest wildlife sanctuary, with a wide range of exotic flora and fauna.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Kerala for Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

We have included the best accommodation alternatives for you in the list below, ranging from affordable to luxury depending upon the Kerala honeymoon package price you opted for.

  • Thekkady’s Spice Village
  • Munnar’s Tea Valley Resort
  • Kumarakom Lake Resort located in Kottayam
  • Alleppey’s Coco Houseboats

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Kerala Lovers Paradise

Cochin, Munnar, Kumarakom, Alleppey

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”20px” css=”.vc_custom_1646646814528{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

FAQs About Kerala Honeymoon

What is the best time to honeymoon in Kerala?
The winter season is the best season for couples looking for a romantic escapade as the rains subside during this time and one can enjoy the soothing and cool climate, especially in the hill stations.
Which is the best month to visit Kerala?
The best time to visit Kerala is from October to February.
How many days are enough for the Kerala trip?
You can cover some prominent destinations and enjoy your honeymoon within 4-5 days.
Is Kerala safe for Honeymoon Couples?
Kerala is a secure place to visit for a honeymoon. It was listed among the least corrupt states as per Transparency International Survey. However, we suggest you follow the instructions indicated by the local guide to ensure your travel is stress-free and safe.
How can I reach Kerala?
Kerala is well connected with major cities and towns across India. It is also well connected by road to neighbouring states like Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, and Andhra Pradesh. There are 4 international and hundreds of railway stations in every town and city of the state. All our Kerala honeymoon packages are designed to include destinations that are well connected by air, rail, or road.
How Do I Travel Within Kerala?
Kerala offers a wide range of transportation choices for visitors. Taxis, auto-rickshaws, buses, a 1050-kilometre railway network, boats, and ships are all available modes of transportation within the state.
What are the visa requirements for international travellers visiting Kerala?
Tourists visiting Kerala must have a three-month tourist visa.
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”show-mobile contact_bg modifiedcontact”][vc_column][vc_column_text]Get the Guaranteed Best Vacation Deals from ATW Travels[/vc_column_text]
